title: hieracium kochtanum
intro: Hieracium kochtanum, also known as Hieracium pilosella, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing oxidative stress. Hieracium kochtanum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to utilize its medicinal properties.
